summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The First Trust Active Factor Small Cap ETF (AFSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US small-cap companies that exhibit exposure to one or more investing factors. AFSM was launched on Dec 3, 2019 and is issued by First Trust.

holdings.infoBox: AFSM is an equity ETF with a total of 335 individual holdings. The top holdings are Penguin Solutions stock at 1.05%, Blue Bird at 0.95%, National HealthCare at 0.95%, Par Pacific Holdings at 0.91%, and Matson at 0.79%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
